@harshitanagpal05 is attempting to deploy a commit to the **ritesh** Team on [Vercel](https://vercel.com).

In all cases, we re-allow further reviews after a brief timeout. > > Please see our [FAQ](https://docs.coderabbit.ai/faq) for further information. > >

> >
> ­ƒôÑ Commits > > Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between d15f8b1b6ab44086f0e84d31302ec6b0505eae8d and 5e3c61fa4609f2a7a840867ad2a3bb05161ef26c. > >
> >
> ­ƒôÆ Files selected for processing (1) > > * `backend/main.py` > >
> >
­ƒôØ Walkthrough ## Walkthrough This PR integrates duplicate-detection indexing into the ticket-save workflow. After persisting a ticket to Supabase, the `/tickets/save` endpoint now indexes it for duplicate detection using the ticket's description or subject text. Supabase initialization is made defensive with try/except error handling, and the response includes new fields tracking indexing status and optional warnings. ## Changes **Duplicate-detection indexing for saved tickets** | Layer / File(s) | Summary | |---|---| | **Defensive Supabase client initialization**
`backend/main.py` | Supabase import and `create_client` construction are wrapped in `try/except` to validate environment variables; failures result in `supabase = None` instead of raising at import time. | | **Duplicate-index maintenance in /tickets/save**
`backend/main.py` | After ticket insertion, the endpoint extracts description/subject text and calls `duplicate_service.add_ticket(...)`, tracking success in `duplicate_indexed` and capturing optional `duplicate_index_warning` on error or missing input. | | **Extended /tickets/save response**
`backend/main.py` | Success response now includes `duplicate_indexed` flag and conditionally `duplicate_index_warning` alongside `ticket_id`. | | **Changelog documentation**
`CHANGES.md` | New entry documents the duplicate-indexing behavior, text-selection fallback logic, non-blocking failure handling, and validation notes. | ­ƒÄ» 3 (Moderate) | ÔÅ▒´©Å ~20 minutes > A rabbit hops through tickets new, > Indexing each one in the queue, > If duplicates bloom, we'll know it well, > Supabase safeÔÇöit'll never rebel! ­ƒÉ░Ô£¿
­ƒÜÑ Pre-merge checks | Ô£à 5
Ô£à Passed checks (5 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :------------------------: | :------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | Ô£à Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbitÔÇÖs high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | Ô£à Passed | The title 'Fix: saved tickets not added to duplicate detection index' directly and clearly describes the main issue resolved in the PRÔÇötickets are now properly indexed for duplicate detection after being saved. | | Docstring Coverage | Ô£à Passed | Docstring coverage is 100.00% which is sufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. | | Linked Issues check | Ô£à Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. | | Out of Scope Changes check | Ô£à Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. |
Ô£Å´©Å Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
Ô£¿ Finishing Touches
­ƒº¬ Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests

Right inside Slack. > > ­ƒæë [Get started](https://agent.coderabbit.ai/) > >

Addressed the requested review fixes and pushed the updates. The remaining failed check appears to be a Vercel authorization/deployment permission issue for external contributors.
